title: RFM 2026
text:
The workshop takes place on the Woudestein campus of the Erasmus University Rotterdam. Detailed information on the location of the workshop will be provided in the coming months.

title: Response Force Meeting 2026
text:
Workshop on response force measurements for psychological research

September 7th & 8th 2026  Erasmus University Rotterdam



The meeting aims to bring together researchers from various countries and disciplines to discuss the latest developments in response force measurements and to foster future collaboration. We look forward to welcoming you to Rotterdam in September 2026!
